title: regreSSHion: Remote Code Execution in OpenSSH
description: Race condition in signal handler allows unauthenticated remote code execution as root on glibc-based Linux systems.

title: OpenSSH ssh-agent Remote Code Execution
description: PKCS#11 provider handling in ssh-agent allows remote code execution via a crafted PKCS#11 shared library.

title: Apache HTTP Server Request Smuggling
description: HTTP request smuggling via mod_proxy when enabled with RewriteRule or ProxyPassMatch.

title: Apache HTTP Server Path Traversal
description: Path traversal and RCE via crafted request when 'Require all denied' is not configured.

title: nginx mp4 Module Buffer Overwrite
description: Memory corruption in nginx mp4 module allows local code execution via crafted mp4 file.

title: nginx DNS Resolver Off-by-One Heap Write
description: Off-by-one error in nginx resolver allows network attacker to write a dot character out of bounds in a heap-allocated buffer.

title: vsftpd 2.3.4 Backdoor Command Execution
description: Backdoor in vsftpd 2.3.4 allows remote command execution via a ':)' string in the USER command.

title: ProFTPD mod_copy Arbitrary File Copy
description: Unauthenticated copy of files via SITE CPFR/CPTO in mod_copy module.

title: MySQL Authentication Bypass
description: Authentication bypass due to improper casting — approximately 1 in 256 connection attempts succeed with wrong password.

title: Redis Lua Sandbox Escape RCE
description: Lua sandbox escape in Debian/Ubuntu Redis packages allows authenticated RCE.

title: PostgreSQL Memory Disclosure in Aggregate Functions
description: Certain aggregate function calls can read bytes of server memory beyond the allocated buffer.

title: Exim Remote Code Execution (The Return of the WIZard)
description: Remote command execution as root via crafted recipient address in MAIL FROM.

title: Postfix SMTP Smuggling
description: SMTP smuggling allows spoofed emails to bypass SPF protections.

title: PHP CGI Argument Injection RCE
description: Argument injection via Best-Fit character mapping in PHP CGI on Windows allows unauthenticated RCE.

title: Apache Tomcat RCE via Partial PUT
description: Time-of-check Time-of-use (TOCTOU) race condition allowing RCE via crafted PUT requests on case-insensitive filesystems.

title: Squid HTTP Request Smuggling
description: HTTP request smuggling via chunked encoding allows cache poisoning and access control bypass.

title: HTTP Protocol Stack Remote Code Execution
description: Use-after-free in HTTP.sys allows unauthenticated wormable RCE on Windows.

title: MongoDB Improper Serialization
description: Improper serialization of internal state allows unauthorized read access in sharded clusters.

title: Dropbear SSH Username Enumeration
description: Timing side-channel allows remote username enumeration.

title: lighttpd mod_extforward Use-After-Free
description: Use-after-free in mod_extforward when handling crafted HTTP headers may cause denial of service.

title: Node.js HTTP Request Smuggling via Chunk Extension
description: Denial of service via excessive chunk extension data in HTTP/1.1 transfer-encoding chunked bodies.

title: RabbitMQ Credential Exposure
description: Passwords may be stored in cleartext in system log files.

title: Varnish HTTP/2 Request Smuggling
description: HTTP/2 request smuggling through crafted HTTP/1 backend connections.

title: Pure-FTPd Out-of-Bounds Read
description: Out-of-bounds read in directory listing handling allows information disclosure.

title: Dovecot IMAP Nested MIME DoS
description: Deeply nested MIME parts cause resource exhaustion leading to denial of service.

title: FileZilla Server Path Traversal
description: Directory traversal allows authenticated users to access files outside configured directories.

title: LiteSpeed Web Server Privilege Escalation
description: Authenticated attacker can escalate privileges by exploiting the dashboard utilities.

title: Jetty Multipart DoS
description: OutOfMemoryError via crafted multipart request consuming excessive memory.
